# ScopeCraftAI

> AI-powered Scope of Work and Bill of Materials generation for AV and IT integration professionals.

ScopeCraftAI turns a bill of materials into a professional, delivery-ready Scope of Work document in minutes. Built for AV/UC presales engineers, integrators, and IT professionals who write proposals.

## What it does
- Generate a Scope of Work from a dropped BOM (Excel, CSV, PDF, or pasted text).
- Per-room manual entry with automatic classification into AV systems (Display, Audio, Video, Conferencing, Control, Network, Rack/Power/Peripherals).
- ROM summaries, labor and travel estimates, and .docx export.

## Key facts
- URL: https://scopecraftai.app
- Audience: AV/UC integrators, presales engineers, IT proposal teams.
- Output: professional Scope of Work and Bill of Materials documents.
